_comment: Shipped preset for Z-Image Turbo as Shot Images Stage's backend (from ComfyUI's bundled image_z_image_turbo template). Subgraph instance #57; the inner CLIPTextEncode (#27) holds the prompt — composite key '57:27'. ShotImagesStage iterates the storyboard and runs this workflow per shot. Result is auto-detected from SaveImage node #9 as ui_save_batch.
label: Z-Image Turbo (per-shot)
description: Z-Image Turbo (bf16) 8-step text-to-image, one image per Storyboard shot. Fast (~2s/image on a 24GB GPU). Requires z_image_turbo_bf16.safetensors + qwen_3_4b.safetensors + ae.safetensors — see workflows/shot-images/README.md.
